eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa; Pima, AZ; at 08:16 PM ON MAR 9, 2026 Effective until 04:16 AM MAR 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Gilbert Police Department is looking for a Hispanic female, Sandra Solis, 31 years-old, 5 foot 4 inches, 170 pounds, with brown hair and brown eyes. No clothing description is available for Sandra. She was last seen in the area of Higley and Chandler Heights in Gilbert, Arizona, Maricopa County, on 03/05/2026 at approximately 1500 hours, via a rideshare service. Sandra has a medical condition that can cause her to become easily confused. Information indicates Sandra may be in the Tucson area. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
